metadata.description: Plugins for HVAC and plumbing wholesale distributors using CoWork for Distributors. Built by Tenexity.

plugins.name: tenexity-setup-hvac-plumbing
plugins.description: Setup plugin for HVAC and plumbing wholesale distributors. Bundles the three skills required to personalise the CoWork for Distributors scaffold — Onboarding Coach, System Review, and First Week Guide — into a single one-click install.
